nodes.snippet:
function modelSlug(value: string) {
  return value
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "")
    .replace(/-{2,}/g, "-")
}
